description: ï»¿Low-cut styling on a classic suede shoe, this pair from woodland is set to become your mainstay while braving the great outdoors. Crafted in two tone suede, with colour block styling, this shoe is a closet staple. Aggressive outsole with lugs, D-ring eyelets and tough overlays make this an adventurer's sartorial dream. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo t-shirt.UpperTwo tone leather upper with strategically placed overlaysThree-hole lace ups with D-ring metal eyeletsStitch deatil at the seams of the toe boxPadded tonguePull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe MidsoleRubber midsoleOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and a raised heelShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not machine wash
